title: Grastidium trichosepalum
intro: There is no information available about Grastidium trichosepalum.
taxonomy: Grastidium trichosepalum is a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. It is native to Australia and is part of the genus Grastidium. The plant belongs to the class Liliopsida and order Poales. The family Restionaceae is commonly known as the restio family, and Grastidium trichosepalum is one of its many species. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and phylogenetic relationships.
